title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入土耳其：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入土耳其：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Turkey CE-aligned electrical safety and EMC rules, TSE / TS EN battery standards, EPDK storage and grid-connection rules, fire-safety review, and UN 38.3 transport expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与土耳其 CE 对应电气安全和 EMC 规则、TSE / TS EN 电池标准、EPDK 储能和并网规则、消防安全审查及 UN 38.3 运输要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與土耳其 CE 對應電氣安全和 EMC 規則、TSE / TS EN 電池標準、EPDK 儲能和併網規則、消防安全審查及 UN 38.3 運輸要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, CE scope determination, TSE approval, EPDK licence decision, grid-connection approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, project developers, designers, and installers should verify current Turkish product-safety, TSE, EPDK, TEIAS / distribution-grid, transport, customs, and local fire-authority requirements with qualified Turkish professionals before shipment, sale, interconnection, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、CE适用范围裁定、TSE批准、EPDK许可决定、并网批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、项目开发商、设计方和安装方在出货、销售、并网或安装前，应与合格土耳其专业人士核实现行土耳其产品安全、TSE、EPDK、TEİAŞ/配电网、运输、海关及地方消防主管机关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、CE適用範圍裁定、TSE批准、EPDK許可決定、併網批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、項目開發商、設計方和安裝方在出貨、銷售、併網或安裝前，應與合格土耳其專業人士核實現行土耳其產品安全、TSE、EPDK、TEİAŞ/配電網、運輸、海關及地方消防主管機關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Turkey, the practical baseline is CE-aligned product compliance where the equipment falls under Turkish low-voltage, EMC, machinery, radio, RoHS, or related product rules; TSE / TS EN IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 evidence is commonly used for battery and system safety; UN 38.3 is needed for lithium-battery transport; and EPDK plus grid-operator review is separate for storage projects and interconnection.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口土耳其时，实务基线是：设备落入土耳其低电压、EMC、机械、无线电、RoHS或相关产品规则范围的，应满足CE对应产品合规；TSE / TS EN IEC 62619和IEC 62933证据通常用于电池和系统安全；锂电运输需要UN 38.3；储能项目和并网还需单独处理EPDK及电网企业审查。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口土耳其時，實務基線是：設備落入土耳其低電壓、EMC、機械、無線電、RoHS或相關產品規則範圍的，應滿足CE對應產品合規；TSE / TS EN IEC 62619和IEC 62933證據通常用於電池和系統安全；鋰電運輸需要UN 38.3；儲能項目和併網還需單獨處理EPDK及電網企業審查。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
